body_txt: May overlap with Bio-Augmentation . May occur through Fusion Dance or as part of a Hybridization Plot . Compare Artificial Animal People , Our Werebeasts Are Different , Monstrous Humanoid , Mix-and-Match Man , Mix-and-Match Critters , Flesh Golem , and Frankenstein's Monster when the "hybrid" part is more physically blatant. Overlaps with Blended Beastfolk if they are born through artificial methods rather than reproduction.
